title: JSON file loading without error handling is flagged
text:
diff --git a/src/semantic_guard/loader.py b/src/semantic_guard/loader.py
--- a/src/semantic_guard/loader.py
+++ b/src/semantic_guard/loader.py
@@
+from pathlib import Path
+import json
+
+def load_config(path: str) -> dict[str, object]:
+    return json.loads(Path(path).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
intent: 設定 JSON を読み込む loader を追加する。
rationale: File I/O and JSON parsing need failure handling evidence.
